doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_inf_p: infinity predicate. Returns true iff x is ±Inf (sign-agnostic), false for any other kind. Trivial one-line port: reads kind discriminant. Class 'arithmetic' (50ms budget).
divergence_from_c: C returns int; TS returns boolean. Never throws.
refs: mpfr/src/isinf.c L24–L28 — the C reference (one-line body returning MPFR_IS_INF(x)).
mpfr/tests/tisnan.c — source for the `mined` cases (the predicate-family tests share a test file).
